manifest.Name: Forage Automator
manifest.Description: Automatically collects forageables on the current map with range pickup, whole-map sweep, and target lines.
config.auto-collect-on-range.name: Auto collect on range
config.auto-collect-on-range.tooltip: Automatically collect all forageables within pickup radius as you walk.
config.collect-ground-forage.name: Ground forage
config.collect-ground-forage.tooltip: Collect seasonal forage on the ground, plus spring onions and similar forage crops.
config.collect-bushes.name: Berry bushes
config.collect-bushes.tooltip: Shake berry bushes and tea bushes.
config.collect-artifact-spots.name: Artifact spots
config.collect-artifact-spots.tooltip: Dig artifact and seed spots with a hoe.
config.collect-panning.name: Panning spots
config.collect-panning.tooltip: Pan glittering spots with a copper pan.
config.pickup-radius.name: Pickup radius (tiles)
config.pickup-radius.tooltip: How far from you passive range pickup will collect forageables.
config.auto-collect-whole-map.name: Auto collect whole map
config.auto-collect-whole-map.tooltip: Automatically collect every forageable when you enter a location.
config.range-key.name: Range sweep hotkey
config.range-key.tooltip: Start or stop a forage sweep within pickup radius.
config.whole-map-key.name: Whole map sweep hotkey
config.whole-map-key.tooltip: Start or stop a whole-map forage sweep on the current location.
config.use-pathfinding.name: Use pathfinding
config.use-pathfinding.tooltip: Walk to each target during a whole-map sweep. When off, snap to targets instantly (recommended for high movement speed mods).
config.return-to-start-after-sweep.name: Return to start after sweep
config.return-to-start-after-sweep.toolt: When a sweep finishes or is cancelled, move the player back to where they stood when it started.
config.show-target-lines.name: Show target lines
config.show-target-lines.tooltip: Draw lines from the player to forageables that were not picked up.
config.line-range.name: Line range (tiles)
config.line-range.tooltip: How far away to draw target lines. Set to 0 for the entire current map.
config.show-lines-ground-forage.name: Lines: ground forage
config.show-lines-ground-forage.tooltip: Draw lines to ground forage, spring onions, and similar forage crops.
config.show-lines-bushes.name: Lines: berry bushes
config.show-lines-bushes.tooltip: Draw lines to berry bushes and tea bushes.
config.show-lines-empty-bushes.name: Lines: empty berry bushes
config.show-lines-empty-bushes.tooltip: Draw lines to in-season bushes that have no berries yet or were already shaken today.
config.show-lines-artifact-spots.name: Lines: artifact spots
config.show-lines-artifact-spots.tooltip: Draw lines to artifact and seed spots.
config.show-lines-panning.name: Lines: panning spots
config.color-line.tooltip: RGBA values separated by commas, e.g. 80,255,100,200.
config.color-line-ready.name: Color: ready to collect
config.color-line-out-of-range.name: Color: out of range
config.color-line-missing-tool.name: Color: missing tool
config.color-line-inventory-full.name: Color: inventory full
config.color-line-unreachable.name: Color: unreachable
config.color-line-empty-bush.name: Color: empty berry bush
config.show-hud-messages.name: Show HUD messages
config.show-hud-messages.tooltip: Show on-screen notifications for sweeps and errors.
config.notify-inventory-full.name: Notify when inventory full
config.notify-inventory-full.tooltip: Show a message when pickup is blocked because your inventory is full.
config.notify-missing-tool.name: Notify when tool missing
config.notify-missing-tool.tooltip: Show a message when a hoe or copper pan is required but not in your inventory.
config.notify-riding-horse.name: Notify when riding horse
config.notify-riding-horse.tooltip: Show a message when forage collection is blocked because you are on a horse.
config.show-sweep-experience.name: Show XP in sweep summary
config.show-sweep-experience.tooltip: Include total experience gained in the sweep-complete HUD message.
hud.inventory-full: Inventory full — can't pick up more forage.
hud.missing-tool: Need a {{tool}} in inventory to collect this forageable.
hud.riding-horse: Dismount your horse to collect forage.
commands.fa.start.description: Starts a full-map forage sweep on the current location.
commands.fa.status.description: Shows passive pickup and sweep status.
commands.fa.status.output: Sweep running: {{running}} | State: {{state}} | Queue: {{queue}} | Skipped targets: {{skipped}}
